---
title: "Talks & Presentations"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

<style>
.badge-invited   { background:#5480a7; color:#fff; font-size:.72em; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:6px; vertical-align:middle; }
.badge-highlight { background:#56A754; color:#fff; font-size:.72em; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:6px; vertical-align:middle; }
.badge-award     { background:#c0762a; color:#fff; font-size:.72em; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:6px; vertical-align:middle; }
.badge-poster    { background:#888;    color:#fff; font-size:.72em; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:3px; margin-left:6px; vertical-align:middle; }
.talk-entry { margin-bottom: 1.1rem; }
</style>

## Invited Lectures & Seminars

::: {.talk-entry}
**Circulation analogues for understanding changes in extreme heat events** <span class="badge-invited">Invited</span>  
*Hydro-Climate Extremes Lab Seminar Series*, Ghent University, Belgium · Aug 2025
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**Climate change and extreme events: attribution methods and recent event review** <span class="badge-invited">Invited</span>  
*Summer School: Mapping the Future*, Universidad de León, Spain · Jul 2025
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**How do we have to adapt urban spaces to the new climate?** <span class="badge-invited">Panel Discussion</span>  
*II Palafrugell Conference on Meteorology and Climate Change*, Spain · Nov 2022
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**Combining atmospheric circulation types and daily precipitation to obtain pluviometric regions in mountain areas** <span class="badge-invited">Invited</span>  
*Technical Conference of the Group of Experts on Climate Change in Catalonia*, Barcelona, Spain · Jan 2020
:::

---

## Conference Presentations

### 2025

::: {.talk-entry}
**A High-Impact Precipitation Event database for the Alps (1961–2023)**  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Crespi, A., Pittore, M., Zebisch, M., & Brunner, M. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*International Mountain Conference 2025*, Innsbruck, Austria · Sep 2025
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**Observed and modelled changes in the drivers that trigger compound drought and heatwave events in the Adige River basin (Eastern Italian Alps) with a focus on May 2022**  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Crespi, A., Maines, E., Pittore, M., & Terzi, S. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*EGU General Assembly 2025*, Vienna, Austria · Apr–May 2025
:::

---

### 2024

::: {.talk-entry}
**Attribution of the unprecedented heat event of August 2023 in Barcelona (Spain) to observed and projected global warming**  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Montesinos-Ciuró, E., Cearreta-Innocenti, T., Serrano-Notivoli, R., & Royé, D. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*15th International Meeting on Statistical Climatology (IMSC)*, Météo-France, Toulouse, France · Jul 2024
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**Detection and characterisation of the compound drought and heatwave event of May 2022 in the Adige River catchment (north-eastern Italy)**  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Crespi, A., & Maines, E.  
*15th International Meeting on Statistical Climatology (IMSC)*, Météo-France, Toulouse, France · Jul 2024
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
**Revealing the role of long-term drought in the record-shattering April 2023 heatwave in the Western Mediterranean** <span class="badge-highlight">Highlighted by Organisation</span>  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Insua-Costa, D., Trigo, R. M., & Miralles, D. G. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*EGU General Assembly 2024*, Vienna, Austria · Apr 2024
:::

---

### 2023

::: {.talk-entry}
**Attributing heatwaves to climate change in mountainous areas. An analysis of the summer 2022 heatwaves in the Pyrenees**  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Gonzalez-Herrero, S., Trapero, L., Albalat, A., Insua-Costa, D., Senande-Rivera, M., & Miguez-Macho, G. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*9th International Conference on Meteorology and Climatology of the Mediterranean (MetMed 2023)*, Genova, Italy · May 2023
:::

---

### 2022

::: {.talk-entry}
**Statistical downscaling at very high spatial resolution of snow cover climate projections for the Pyrenees** <span class="badge-award">Awarded</span>  
Lemus-Cánovas, M., Trapero, L., Gascoin, S., & López-Moreno, J. I. · <span class="badge-invited">Oral</span>  
*12th Congress of the Spanish Association of Climatology (AEC)*, Santiago de Compostela, Spain · Oct 2022
:::

---

### 2020

::: {.talk-entry}
**Assessing several downscaling methods for daily minimum and maximum temperature in a mountainous area. Are we able to statistically simulate a warmer climate in the Pyrenees?** <span class="badge-highlight">Highlighted by Organisation</span>  
Lemus-Canovas, M., & Brands, S.  
*EGU General Assembly 2020*, Online · May 2020
:::

---

### 2019

::: {.talk-entry}
**An R package for computing a synoptic classification and spatial regionalization of precipitation data** <span class="badge-award">Best Poster Award</span>  
Lemus-Canovas, M., Lopez-Bustins, J. A., & Martin-Vide, J. · <span class="badge-poster">Poster</span>  
*7th International Conference on Meteorology and Climatology of the Mediterranean (MetMed 2019)*, Palma de Mallorca, Spain · Mar 2019
:::
